# Model attribution

“White XBOX Controller” by
[CREATRBOI](https://sketchfab.com/CREATRBOI), sourced from
[Sketchfab](https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/white-xbox-controller-c46f717692b6497a9d6edee010a7bb67).

Licensed under the
[Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

Changes made for this application:

- imported and normalized the downloaded GLB scene in Blender;
- derived a warm-white and deep-gray base-color texture;
- changed the colored A/B/X/Y legends to one warm-neutral color;
- placed a separate, removable cover over the Xbox mark on the center button;
- added warm-neutral studio lighting and centered transparent framing.

The original GLB geometry remains intact beneath the removable cover. Xbox and
related product names and marks belong to their respective owners. Their
mention identifies the visual reference and does not imply endorsement by
CREATRBOI, Microsoft, Sketchfab, or Creative Commons.
